resumeProfile.name: Masthan Basha Shaik
resumeProfile.summary: DevOps‑focused engineer with hands‑on experience building CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, AWS CodePipeline) and deploying Java/Python/Node.js microservices on Docker and AWS Lambda. Proven ability to automate infrastructure with CloudFormation, enforce security, performance and high‑availability standards, and support rapid product releases in startup environments. Strong problem‑solving mindset and collaborative communication.

bullets: Designed CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and AWS CodePipeline to automate build, test, and deployment of Node.js microservices to Docker containers on AWS ECS, reducing release cycle time by 40%.
Implemented infrastructure as code with AWS CloudFormation templates for VPC, RDS, and Lambda functions, enabling reproducible environments and zero‑downtime deployments.
Configured monitoring, logging, and automated rollback scripts to meet HA and disaster‑recovery SLAs, improving system uptime to 99.9%.

projects.name: Doctor Appointment Booking System
projects.description: Deployed a secure, role‑based appointment service on AWS using Docker and Lambda; integrated CI/CD with GitHub Actions to run automated tests and push updates, ensuring compliance and performance benchmarks.

projects.name: Business Management System

certifications: Python Full Stack Developer Intern – Blackbucks
achievements: Developed and deployed 3 microservices on AWS with Docker, achieving 30% faster response times.
Solved 200+ algorithm challenges on LeetCode and HackerRank, sharpening problem‑solving efficiency.
Integrated Razorpay payment gateway and automated email notifications, improving transaction reliability.

emailBody.subject: Application for Remote React/Node Developer Jobs at Top U.S. Companies — Shaik
emailBody.body:
Hi Top U.S. Companies team,

I’m Masthan Basha Shaik, a full‑stack engineer who delivered a React/Node SaaS platform handling 15k daily active users, built on PostgreSQL and AWS Lambda.

I noticed Turing’s focus on scaling manufacturing‑tech products for U.S. makers; your recent case study on a bike‑factory automation suite aligns with my experience integrating real‑time data streams into React dashboards.

I own the end‑to‑end delivery cycle, turning specs into production‑ready code while automating CI/CD pipelines.

Resume: https://res.cloudinary.com/db4am4mqh/raw/upload/v1780808436/job-hunt-resumes/resume_5d0752ab-09b9-45ca-8042-896bd466b474_1780808434313
Portfolio: https://basha-portfolio.vercel.app/

Best,
Masthan Basha Shaik
+91 78937 02635 · official4basha@gmail.com

Portfolio: https://basha-portfolio.vercel.app/
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/masthan-basha-ms/
GitHub: https://github.com/basha-masthan

bullets: Worked on MERN stack projects - built React frontends, Node.js REST APIs, and managed databases (MongoDB, PostgreSQL) end-to-end.

Collaborated in a team of 5 using Git/GitHub with code reviews and agile sprints. Wrote basic unit tests and helped troubleshoot bugs.

emailBody.subject: Application for Remote React/Node Developer Jobs at Top U.S. Companies — Shaik
emailBody.body:
Hi Top U.S. Companies team,

I’m Masthan Basha Shaik, a Full‑Stack Engineer who delivered a React‑Node SaaS platform handling 15k daily API calls, built with PostgreSQL, Docker and CI/CD on AWS.

I noticed Turing’s emphasis on end‑to‑end product ownership while supporting 10 successful U.S. manufacturers—exactly the kind of impact‑driven work I thrive on.

My track record of shipping production‑ready features in tight sprints aligns with your need for a developer who owns the entire web development process.

Resume: https://res.cloudinary.com/db4am4mqh/raw/upload/v1780803402/job-hunt-resumes/resume_0eca1dfd-f51c-4d37-869d-f991854b00ce_1780803400839
Portfolio: https://basha-portfolio.vercel.app/

Masthan Basha Shaik
+91 78937 02635 · official4basha@gmail.com

Portfolio: https://basha-portfolio.vercel.app/
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/masthan-basha-ms/
GitHub: https://github.com/basha-masthan

emailBody.subject: Application for Platform & Infrastructure Engineer (m/w/d) — Shaik
emailBody.body:
Hi Aurivian GmbH team,

I’m Masthan Basha Shaik, a full‑stack engineer who shipped a multi‑tenant Shopware‑6 storefront on AWS, automating CI/CD pipelines with Docker and PowerShell scripts.

I noticed Aurivian recently expanded its managed services to include end‑to‑end Shopware hosting for DACH mid‑market retailers – a perfect match for my experience scaling Shopware clusters and tightening security postures.

My strongest asset is turning complex infrastructure into repeatable, zero‑downtime deployments, exactly what your growing platform team needs.

Portfolio: https://basha-portfolio.vercel.app/

Masthan Basha Shaik
+91 78937 02635 · official4basha@gmail.com

Portfolio: https://basha-portfolio.vercel.app/
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/masthan-basha-ms/
GitHub: https://github.com/basha-masthan

jobs.matchReason: The candidate has strong AWS, Docker, CI/CD, and infrastructure‑as‑code experience matching the platform/infrastructure focus, but limited exposure to Kubernetes/Terraform and overall seniority.

emailBody.body:
Hi Nxtwave team,

I'm Masthan Basha Shaik, a Full-Stack Engineer who delivers production‑ready products from UI to deployment.

At my current role I built React/Next.js frontends and Node.js services that handle real‑time data streams for manufacturing dashboards, matching your need for scalable user interfaces and backend integrations.

I differentiate myself by coupling rapid learning with full ownership—leveraging AI assistants and automation to cut development cycles while maintaining high quality.

My resume is attached to this email. 

Portfolio: https://basha-portfolio.vercel.app/
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/masthan-basha-ms/
GitHub: https://github.com/basha-masthan

Best regards,
Masthan Basha Shaik
+91 78937 02635 · official4basha@gmail.com

emailBody.subject: Application for Software Engineer I -Full stack engineering (Python)-Software Engineer II — Shaik
emailBody.body:
Hi Deloitte team,

I'm Masthan Basha Shaik, a Full-Stack Engineer who delivers production‑ready applications from UI to cloud.

Your Customer Team focuses on advanced analytics, GenAI and end‑to‑end digital experiences. I have built full‑stack solutions with React, Node.js and Django, integrating PostgreSQL, MongoDB and AWS services, and I routinely use AI assistants (Claude, Gemini, Copilot) to accelerate development and debugging—directly aligning with your push for innovative, AI‑enhanced delivery.

I differentiate myself by coupling rapid learning with deep ownership; I design, code, test, deploy and automate the entire lifecycle, ensuring reliability and speed.

My resume is attached to this email. PDF link: 
Portfolio: https://basha-portfolio.vercel.app/
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/masthan-basha-ms/
GitHub: https://github.com/basha-masthan

Best regards,
Masthan Basha Shaik
+91 78937 02635 · official4basha@gmail.com

With 1.5+ years of experience in building scalable web applications, I am confident in my ability to contribute to the company's mission. jobs.coverLetter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to apply for the Junior Full-Stack Engineer position at Epic Kids Inc. With a strong foundation in computer science and a passion for building scalable web applications, I am confident that I would be a valuable addition to your remote engineering team. My experience in writing clean, maintainable, and well-tested code, as well as my proficiency in modern frontend technologies and backend development, aligns with the requirements of this role. I am particularly drawn to Epic Kids Inc.'s mission to provide innovative solutions for children's education, and I am impressed by the company's commitment to creativity and excellence. As a full-stack engineer with 1.5+ years of experience, I have developed a solid understanding of software development principles and have worked on various projects that demonstrate my skills in designing and developing responsive web applications, building RESTful APIs, and integrating third-party APIs. I am excited about the opportunity to work with Angular and PHP/Go and contribute to the development of innovative solutions for Epic Kids Inc. I am a strong believer in the importance of continuous learning and professional growth, and I am eager to work with a talented team of engineers who share my passion for software development. Thank you for considering my application. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss my qualifications further and learn more about the team's work.

emailBody.subject: Application for Remote Junior Full-Stack Engineer: Angular + PHP/Go — Full-Stack Engineer
emailBody.body:
Hi Epic Kids Inc. team,

I'm Masthan Basha Shaik, a full-stack engineer who builds production-ready products end-to-end, from frontend to backend, databases, deployment, and automation.

I'm drawn to this role because it involves implementing features in Angular and PHP, which aligns with my experience in writing clean, maintainable, and well-tested code, as well as my proficiency in modern frontend technologies and backend development. My strong problem-solving skills and experience with REST API design will enable me to investigate bugs and participate in code reviews effectively.

As a fast learner with a strong sense of ownership, I thrive in environments where I can take on new challenges and deliver high-quality solutions.

My resume is attached, and you can also view my portfolio at https://portfolio.com and my Cloudinary link will be provided upon request.

Best regards,
Masthan Basha Shaik

As a full-stack engineer with 1.5+ years of experience, I am confident in my ability to design and develop scalable web applications. My strong proficiency in modern frontend technologies and backend development, including React.js, Node.js, and Express.js, aligns with the requirements of this role. I have a proven track record of writing clean, maintainable, and well-tested code, with comprehensive unit and integration tests. I am passionate about owning features end-to-end from design through production deployment and have experience with project estimation, stakeholder communication, and technical documentation. I am particularly drawn to this role because of the opportunity to work with a national financial client and contribute to challenging and rewarding projects. I am impressed by CGS Business Solutions' commitment to helping IT professionals find the next right step in their careers and am excited about the prospect of joining a team that values technical expertise and collaboration. With my technical skills, passion for innovation, and dedication to delivering high-quality solutions, I am confident that I would be a valuable asset to your team. Hi CGS Business Solutions Hiring Team,

I'm Masthan Basha Shaik, a full-stack engineer based in Bangalore, India.

I enjoy building production-ready products end-to-end, from frontend to backend, databases, deployment, and automation. jobs.coverLetter:
Dear Hiring Team at Robert Half,

I am writing to express my interest in the Full‑Stack Developer position focused on React front‑end development. With over 1.5 years of hands‑on experience building scalable web applications, I have a proven track record of delivering responsive user interfaces and robust back‑end services that align with the modernization goals outlined in your job description.

At Devloom Labs, I designed and implemented multiple React‑based applications using modern JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, and CSS3, ensuring cross‑browser compatibility and performance optimization. I complemented the front‑end work by creating RESTful APIs with Node.js and Express, integrating third‑party services, and managing PostgreSQL and MySQL databases. My commitment to code quality is demonstrated through comprehensive unit and integration testing with Jest, as well as CI/CD pipelines that streamlined deployments to AWS (Lambda, EC2, RDS).

One of my key achievements was leading the end‑to‑end development of an internal process management system that automated workflow tasks for a mid‑size client, reducing manual effort by 40% and improving system response times by 25%. I actively monitored production metrics, responded to alerts, and performed root‑cause analysis to resolve critical issues, ensuring high availability and reliability.

Beyond technical expertise, I excel in stakeholder communication, translating business requirements into technical specifications, and providing clear documentation throughout the development lifecycle. My ability to estimate effort accurately and collaborate within Agile teams makes me a strong fit for the fast‑paced environment at Robert Half.

I am excited about the opportunity to contribute to your legacy‑modernization initiatives and help elevate the performance of your applications. Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to discussing how my skills and experience can add value to your team.

Sincerely,
Masthan Basha Shaik

emailBody.body:
Hi YO IT Consulting team,

I'm Masthan Basha Shaik, a full-stack engineer who builds production-ready products end-to-end, from frontend to backend, databases, deployment, and automation.

jobs.coverLetter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to express my interest in the Remote Full‑Stack Developer role advertised for various employers. With over 1.5 years of hands‑on experience building scalable web applications at Devloom Labs, I have honed a deep proficiency in JavaScript, React, Node.js, and SQL databases—core technologies highlighted in your posting. My day‑to‑day responsibilities included designing responsive front‑ends with React and modern ES6+ syntax, crafting robust RESTful APIs using Express, and optimizing PostgreSQL and MySQL schemas for performance. I consistently delivered end‑to‑end features, from initial design and estimation through CI/CD deployment on AWS (Lambda, EC2, RDS) and Docker‑based pipelines.

Beyond technical execution, I championed code quality through comprehensive unit and integration testing with Jest, and I collaborated closely with QA and stakeholder teams to ensure reliable releases. My experience monitoring production metrics and responding to alerts has equipped me with a strong DevOps mindset, enabling rapid issue resolution and continuous improvement. I am comfortable working remotely, leveraging Git/GitHub for version control and asynchronous communication, which aligns well with your flexible work‑from‑home environment.

I am particularly drawn to this opportunity because it allows me to apply my full‑stack expertise across diverse projects while contributing to innovative solutions for multiple clients. My track record of shipping three production‑grade applications, coupled with certifications in Google Cloud and ethical hacking, demonstrates a commitment to both functional excellence and security best practices.

I am eager to bring my problem‑solving abilities, stakeholder communication skills, and passion for end‑to‑end feature ownership to your team. Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to discussing how my background can add value to your organization.

Sincerely,
Masthan Basha Shaik
